string-array.name: alarm_dismiss_good_morning
string-array.item: Let time tell the story and give yourself a rest.
"It's okay to be off the track. You can catch up soon."
"Don't push yourself too hard to be happy :)"
"When you're lost, ask others for help."
Hope the rest of your day goes well.
I hope all goes well with you.
"If you're tired, take a good rest."
Have a beautiful day ahead!
"Things don't always work out the way you wanted, but it's okay."
Change your mornings with Alarmy
Happiness is a habit, just like anything else.
"Don't be afraid to fail. You can do it."
Alarmy is here for you.
See yourself change every morning with Alarmy :)
Wow! Can your future BE any brighter?
Let me share my good luck to you .
If today was rough, another day will turn out to be great.
I have a strong feeling something good will happen today.
I wish you a day as colorful as the rainbow.
What songs do you feel like listening to?
Good things will happen today.
I think everything will turn out great for you.
"It's okay to be a little bit lost. I sometimes am too."
I get a feeling that good news is coming for you.
You are good enough.

string-array.name: category_names
string-array.item: @string/emoji_category_emotions
@string/emoji_category_people
@string/emoji_category_animals_nature
@string/emoji_category_food_drink
@string/emoji_category_travel_places
@string/emoji_category_activity
@string/emoji_category_objects
@string/emoji_category_symbols
@string/emoji_category_flags

string-array.name: exo_controls_playback_speeds
string-array.item: Normal
2x

string-array.name: graph_time_range_entries
string-array.item: Morning
Afternoon
All day

string-array.name: greeting_0_to_3
string-array.item:
"Do you know it's already past midnight?
Hope you have a great day"
I normally watch YouTube videos at this time.

"Thank you for using me.
I will get better tomorrow!"
"You will wake up easily with me, 'Alarmy', no worries needed :)"

"Can't get to sleep?
Lay aside your worries and close your eyes"

"It's fine to get lost and wander.
I do so too in such hard times"
"Don't get too stuck on what went wrong, there are always ways to solve them"
I will never give up on waking you up!

string-array.name: greeting_12_to_15
string-array.item:
"Did you eat well?
Have a great day!"

"I always get sleepy after having a meal.
When you feel so, take a short nap :)"

"I will get better.
I want to be an application you like"

"Anything you wish that would happen today?
I will pray for you. bye :)"

"I want you to be satisfied.
If you have any problems, please tell me."

string-array.name: greeting_15_to_18
string-array.item:
"The day's almost over.
Hope you enjoy the rest of the day"

"Tictoc…Tictoc…
We are concentrating on making Alarmy"

"Cheer up!
We'll be cheering you on too, from afar."

"You know Alarmy is always cheering for you, right?
You can do it!"

"You are my precious friend.
Very best regards"

"This is not a goodbye, right?
See you tomorrow :)"

string-array.name: greeting_18_to_21
string-array.item:
"You did a good job today
See you tomorrow :)"

"Not the best of days?
Here's to a happier tomorrow, I promise."

"Thank you for using Alarmy
You're the best!"

"All things will be well.
No worries"

"Cheer up!
You did a great job."

"Let's call it a day, bye!
Cheers!"

"You are a good person.
Like me :)"

string-array.name: greeting_21_to_24
string-array.item:
"How was your day?
Sleep tight for a brighter tomorrow."

"Any worries?
Stop thinking for a while"

"I am casting a spell on you so you can sleep well!
Good night :)"

"Sleep tight!
Thanks for today!"

"Going to bed?
Sleep well :)"

"Don't use your phone too much.
Give your eyes some rest."

"It was an unpredictable day.
Hope tomorrow is full of happiness"

"Sometimes, just let things happen.
All will pass in time."

"You must be a good person.
You are using Alarmy!"

"I will be waiting for you.
See ya!"

string-array.name: greeting_3_to_6
string-array.item:
"Still up?
It's better to sleep early :)"

"Sleep is critical to flushing out toxins from the body.
Have a good night"
"Alarmy hopes you don't get tired tomorrow"
"It's time to put your phone down and close your eyes… good night!"
It pains me to see people struggling to wake up in the morning
When lost, just ask for directions!
Keep up the good work, you are doing great :)

string-array.name: greeting_6_to_9
string-array.item:
"Hope you have an energetic day.
Yeah!"

"You must be a diligent person, using me at this time.
Have a good day :)"
It feels like something good will happen today.
To a day without regrets!
Hope you have a wonderfully happy day :)
Today I feel like wanting to say hi like this, and wish all things well :)
Good things will happen today
Whether it be a good, bad or any normal day, each day being with you is a great day for me

string-array.name: greeting_9_to_12
string-array.item:
"It's almost lunchtime!
Grab something delicious!"

"Enjoy your lunch!
Don't go overboard on the carbs though.."

"I just like you
Wish you all the best today."

"Something good will happen in the afternoon.
I can feel it."

"Seeing how you use Alarmy, I can tell that you're a person who cares about time.
See ya!"

"What are you going to eat?
Have a good lunch!"

Silent

30 seconds
60 seconds
5 minutes
10 minutes
30 minutes

1 time
2 times
3 times
4 times
5 times

1 minute
5 minutes
10 minutes
15 minutes
20 minutes
25 minutes
30 minutes

On(default dismiss mode only)
On(all modes)

string-array.name: timer_notifications
string-array.item: Less than a minute remaining

string-array.name: today_panel_horoscope_hooking_string
string-array.item: What color is best for me today?
Seeking for advice? Check it out here!
You might get some help for your day.
"What's my lucky number today?"
Today may be a special day. Get a sneak peek!
